2604.24088.title: TACO: Efficient Communication Compression of Intermediate Tensors for Scalable Tensor-Parallel LLM Training
2604.24088.paper_summary: Handling communication overhead in large-scale tensor-parallel training remains a critical challenge due to the dense, near-zero distributions of intermediate tensors, which exacerbate errors under frequent communication and introduce significant computational overhead during compression. To this end, we propose TACO (Tensor-parallel Adaptive COmmunication compression), a robust FP8-based framework for compressing TP intermediate tensors. First, we employ a data-driven reshaping strategy combined with an Adaptive Scale-Hadamard Transform to enable high-fidelity FP8 quantization, while its Dual-Scale Quantization mechanism ensures numerical stability throughout training. Second, we design a highly fused compression operator to reduce memory traffic and kernel launch overhead, allowing efficient overlap with communication. Finally, we integrate TACO with existing state-of-the-art methods for Data and Pipeline Parallelism to develop a compression-enabled 3D-parallel training framework. Detailed experiments on GPT models and Qwen model demonstrate up to 1.87X end-to-end throughput improvement while maintaining near-lossless accuracy, validating the effectiveness and efficiency of TACO in large-scale training.
2604.24088.paper_summary_zh: 處理大規模張量並行訓練中的通信開銷仍然是一個關鍵挑戰，因為中間張量的密集、接近零的分佈在頻繁通信下加劇了錯誤，並在壓縮過程中引入了顯著的計算開銷。為此，我們提出了 TACO（張量並行自適應通信壓縮），這是一個基於 FP8 的穩健框架，用於壓縮 TP 中間張量。首先，我們採用數據驅動的重塑策略，結合自適應比例哈達瑪變換，以實現高保真度的 FP8 量化，而其雙比例量化機制確保了訓練過程中的數值穩定性。其次，我們設計了一個高度融合的壓縮運算子，以減少內存流量和內核啟動開銷，從而實現與通信的高效重疊。最後，我們將 TACO 與現有的最先進的數據和管道並行方法集成，以開發一個支持壓縮的 3D 並行訓練框架。對 GPT 模型和 Qwen 模型的詳細實驗顯示，端到端吞吐量提高了多達 1.87 倍，同時保持近無損的準確性，驗證了 TACO 在大規模訓練中的有效性和效率。
2604.24088.author: Man Liu et.al.
2604.24088.authors: Man Liu, Xingchen Liu, Xingjian Tian, Bing Lu, Shengkay Lyu, Shengquan Yin, Wenjing Huang, Zheng Wei, Hairui Zhao, Guangming Tan, Dingwen Tao
